goal: Optimize PostToolUse hook, create shared workflow_utils.py, refactor Python scripts to eliminate DRY violations

tasks.name: Optimize PostToolUse formatting hook
tasks.action: Replace subprocess which with shutil.which, add early-exit check, cache repo root

tasks.name: Create workflow_utils.py
tasks.action: Shared module with repo_root(), load_json(), write_json(), load_workflow()
verify: python3 -c "from scripts.workflow_utils import repo_root, load_json; print('OK')"

tasks.name: Refactor Python scripts to use workflow_utils.py
tasks.action: Replace duplicated load_json/repo_root/write_json with imports from workflow_utils

commitMessage: fix(review-findings-remediation): optimize PostToolUse, consolidate Python utils
